title: Vasco Da Gama Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Vasco Da Gama, with a Z-Score of +3.74. This anomaly has reached a critical level, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Vasco Da Gama has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 75%, and wind speed is 25.2 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The situation is critical, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating the dominance of heat over the region.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
